name: memoboard
description: A local-first desktop memo board app built with Tauri.
author: Yomiai

scripts.check: node tools/check-renderer-js.js && node tools/audit-static.js && node tools/regression-scenarios.js && node tools/manifest-regression.js && node tools/markdown-regression.js && node tools/mermaid-regression.js
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run tauri:build
